feed.title: Marsisus
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive and feature-rich Jekyll theme for technical writing.

entry.title: A site for my high school to access digital manuals.

link.title: A site for my high school to access digital manuals.

entry.summary:
It’s not properly a tutorial but it sets the way you can follow to do a thing that ressembles mine.
This post explains how and why I made this site, and the main steps to do it yourself. The site is in French as I am French, but feel free to translate to any language.
1. Create a project, and choose how to style your site. First, create a HTML/CSS/JS project in your favourite IDE, or via an ...

entry.title: My actions with HEVE
entry.summary:
This post summarizes my participation with Nikita Guerlet’s HEVE project. HEVE is a label meant to encourage little artists on creativity, social media…
Details I am responsible of all the design and the creation of the site, as I have enough capabilities to tackle that. Here’s a theoric timeline of the project:
Wordpress installed and working Design and site content Server renting for...

entry.title: Text and Typography
entry.summary:
This post is to show Markdown syntax rendering on Chirpy, you can also use it as an example of writing. Now, let’s start looking at text and typography.
Headings
H1 - heading
H2 - heading
H3 - heading
H4 - heading
Paragraph
Quisque egestas convallis ipsum, ut sollicitudin risus tincidunt a. Maecenas interdum malesuada egestas. Duis consectetur porta risus, sit amet vulputate urna facilis...
